bug_description: Setelah create master baru (category/unit/brand/supplier), item tidak muncul di dropdown

root_cause.symptom: Dropdown shows placeholder instead of new item name after quick create
root_cause.actual_cause: Backend POST endpoints returned only {id, message} - missing name and code fields
root_cause.evidence: Console log showed: {value: 'uuid', label: undefined, sublabel: undefined}

frontend: Merge props options with local options using useMemo
backend: POST /api/master/units - Returns {id, code, name, symbol, description}
